testcase.name: Basic accessibility snapshot (scaffold)
Cart operations › Add product, update quantity and verify totals (scaffold)
testcase.error:
[chromium] › cart.spec.ts:15:7 › Cart operations › Add product, update quantity and verify totals (scaffold)
TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('input.search-keyword') to be visible
at pages/HomePage.ts:24
22 | // Ensure the search input is visible and ready before filling 23 | await this.searchInput.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 10000 }); > 24 | await this.searchInput.fill(query); | ^ 25 | // Wait for product results to appear / update 26 | await this.page.waitForSelector('.products .product', { timeout: 5000 }); 27 | } at HomePage.search (/Users/kanhaiyayadav/workspace/playwriteAgents/tests/pages/HomePage.ts:24:28) at /Users/kanhaiyayadav/workspace/playwriteAgents/tests/cart.spec.ts:25:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/cart-Cart-operations-Add-p-3c87b-and-verify-totals-scaffold--chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/cart-Cart-operations-Add-p-3c87b-and-verify-totals-scaffold--chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Offline handling shows error or offline indicator (scaffold)
testcase.error:
[chromium] › network.spec.ts:3:5 › Offline handling shows error or offline indicator (scaffold) ──
Error: page.reload: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED Call log: - waiting for navigation until "load"
5 | await page.context().setOffline(true); 6 | // Reload to simulate offline navigation > 7 | await page.reload(); | ^ 8 | // Check for some offline indicator or failure state - scaffold 9 | expect(await page.title()).toBeTruthy(); 10 | }); at /Users/kanhaiyayadav/workspace/playwriteAgents/tests/network.spec.ts:7:14
